metadata.greeting: This weekend is packed with exciting and free activities for your little one! I've found some lovely options close to home in Hackney, including events at the Young V&A and outdoor fun in Victoria Park. There are also some fantastic Easter themed events coming up if you are looking to plan ahead.

activities.title: Library Club at the Hackney Showroom
activities.description: Reading corner and diverse book-pairing service
activities.whyItWorks: A relaxed and stimulating environment for toddlers to engage with books and stories

transport.fromHackney: Bus or Overground to Hackney Downs
transport.tip: Check term times before you go!

activities.title: Young V&A
activities.description: Museum designed specifically for children with collections of toys, design and interactive exhibits.
activities.whyItWorks: Designed with sensory play and learning in mind, great for toddlers to explore.

transport.tip: Avoid peak hours as it can get crowded.

activities.title: Victoria Park
activities.description: Large park with playgrounds, gardens, and open spaces.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of space to run around, playgrounds suitable for toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Bus or Overground to Hackney Wick
transport.tip: Pack a picnic to enjoy in the park.

activities.title: Museum of the Home
activities.description: Explore historical homes through the ages.
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on things for them to do, even an old computer with basic games. Beautiful little, enclosed garden

transport.tip: Pick up an activity sheet or a free explorer backpack from the front desk.

activities.title: Half Moon Theatre
activities.description: Professional theatre for children with live shows and virtual performances.
activities.whyItWorks: Wide range of live shows and virtual performances. Also offers youth theatre groups for older kids

transport.tip: Check the schedule for age-appropriate shows.

activities.title: Discover Children's Story Centre
activities.description: Storytelling and creative play space for children.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive exhibits and workshops designed to inspire a love of reading and creativity.

transport.tip: Check the schedule for special events and workshops.

activities.title: Mudchute Park and Farm
activities.description: Working city farm with a variety of animals.
activities.whyItWorks: Toddlers will love seeing the animals and learning about farm life.

transport.tip: Check for special events like lamb feeding.

activities.title: Queen Elizabeth Olympic Park
activities.description: Vast park with playgrounds, walking trails, and sporting venues.
activities.whyItWorks: Plenty of space for running around and exploring, plus unique playgrounds.

transport.tip: Check the website for events and activities.

activities.title: Natural History Museum
activities.description: Explore the history of planet Earth with interactive exhibits and dinosaur fossils.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive exhibits that appeal to all ages, and the dinosaur exhibit is a must-see for toddlers.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: District, Circle, or Piccadilly line to South Kensington
transport.tip: Pre-book a time slot to avoid long queues.

activities.title: Science Museum
activities.description: Home to more than 50 exhibits spread across seven distinct zones, promising a fun day out for the whole family
activities.whyItWorks: Hands-on exhibits, Space gallery, where rockets, satellites and the Apollo 10 command module are sure to ignite curiosities.

transport.fromHackney: Tube: District, Circle, or Piccadilly line to South Kensington
transport.tip: The Wonderlab offers a great hands-on experience for a fee.

activities.title: Greenwich Park
activities.description: The oldest enclosed Royal Park in London.
activities.whyItWorks: Wide open spaces for running around, a deer park to explore, and playgrounds for younger children.

transport.tip: Head to One Tree Hill and take in sweeping views of the towering skyscrapers of Canary Wharf and London.

activities.title: Tower Bridge
activities.description: Walk the high-level walkways for stunning city views.
activities.whyItWorks: Interactive exhibits.

transport.tip: Book online for best prices

activities.title: Hampton Court Palace
activities.price: £26.30 - £29.00 for adults, £13.10 - £14.50 for children between 6-17. Kids 5 and under are free.
activities.description: Explore the historic palace, gardens and the Magic Garden playground
activities.whyItWorks: Check out the palace's schedule to learn more about family friendly events like jousting, theater events, and more.

transport.tip: Check the palace's schedule to learn more about family friendly events.

activities.title: Battersea Park
activities.description: A scenic escape with lush gardens, a boating lake, playgrounds, and a mini zoo
activities.whyItWorks: Families can enjoy informal Easter egg hunts, picnics, or just a relaxing walk through this inner-city green space.

transport.fromHackney: Tube and Train to Battersea Park
transport.tip: The pagoda and lakeside paths make it a picturesque destination for photography and leisurely strolls.

activities.title: Cutty Sark
activities.description: Explore the famous sailing ship and learn about its history.
activities.whyItWorks: Meet the cast of colourful characters from the ship's past. Talk to the captain, chat with the cooks, even take a tour with Nannie, the figurehead.

transport.tip: Follow a free family trail and discover what life was like on board as a 19th-century sailor and join in musical storytelling sessions inspired by Cutty Sark's crew.

activities.title: Golders Hill Park Zoo
activities.description: Small zoo with a variety of animals and a playground.
activities.whyItWorks: Toddlers will love seeing the animals, easy to combine with a picnic in the park.

transport.tip: Ideal for a relaxed day out.

activities.title: Horniman Spring Fair
activities.description: Music, dancing, games and general disco fun
activities.whyItWorks: From music to crafts, fairs to festivals, there's something for everyone.

transport.tip: Check the Horniman website for specific dates and times

activities.title: Camden Market Easter Weekender
activities.description: Entertainment from Blossom the Lion, Sita circus acrobat, funny farmers and their cheeky chicken puppet. Easter trail of 3D artworks, get crafty at the Bonnets and Bunnies workshop, plant spring seeds and bulbs, visit the face painter, and Cheeky Meeky Family Rave.
activities.whyItWorks: Lots of entertainment for all ages

transport.tip: Book activities online

activities.title: Easter Eggsplorers at Hobbledown Heath
activities.description: Themed egg trail, climb and explore across indoor and outdoor play, and meet animals along the way.
activities.whyItWorks: Brilliant Easter day out designed to create joyful spring memories for children and their grown-ups.

transport.tip: Book online for a discount

activities.title: Southbank Centre Spring Family Fun
activities.price: Some paid activities and some free
activities.description: A festival of fun and creativity for families including super shows, musical adventures, amazing puppetry and lots of free fun in the Easter break.
activities.whyItWorks: Multi-artform programme presents music, storytelling, dance, crafts, comedy and more with dozens of events.

transport.tip: Check the Southbank Centre website for specific events and times.

activities.title: Lindt Gold Bunny Hunt at Hampton Court Palace
activities.description: Roam around the gardens and find hidden Lindt Gold Bunny statues to win a chocolate treat
activities.whyItWorks: chocolate prize at the end

transport.tip: Walk through the gardens, looking for elusive Lindt GOLD BUNNY statues peeking out from daffodils.

activities.title: Vauxhall City Farm Easter Activities
activities.description: Free Easter hunts and bonnet-making crafts. Animals on your doorstep
activities.whyItWorks: Must for families and animal-lovers, with a host of goats, sheep and smaller animals.

transport.tip: Located in Zone 1

activities.title: London Zoo Zoonormous Egg Hunt
activities.description: Wander past giraffes, lions, monkeys and more incredible wildlife as you search for hidden eggs on a special Easter egg hunt
activities.whyItWorks: Special Easter egg hunt (included in zoo entry)

transport.tip: Book tickets in advance

activities.title: Kew Gardens - Bluey at Kew
activities.price: Included with entry to the gardens.
activities.description: Bluey-themed interactive activities for the whole family, including a Play Zone with 3D installations and the chance to meet the Bluey character.
activities.whyItWorks: Perfect for children aged 3–6 and their families.

transport.tip: Ticket is included with entry to the gardens.
